question.text: The optimal time to start filling Bucket 1 of the bucket strategy is:

answer.text: 5-10 years before retirement to lock in favorable rates and build the income foundation
Only after all other financial goals are met

explanation.text: **The Logic:** Starting to fill Bucket 1 in the pre-retirement stage (5-10 years before) allows locking in favorable interest rates on FDs and bonds, and building the income foundation before actual income needs begin. **The Trap:** Starting at retirement (Option A) may mean investing at unfavorable rates. After 75 (Option D) is far too late — Bucket 1 is needed immediately at retirement. **Cross-Exam Context:** Pre-retirement bucket filling is discussed in Series XVII Chapter 7. It connects to the pre-retirement planning activities in Chapter 3. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** Begin transitioning growth assets to income-generating investments 5-7 years before retirement. This phased approach captures different rate environments and reduces timing risk.
